g2n4.title: Air
g2n4.transition: Let the hypnotic bassline of Air ride out for 32 bars, then nudge the high-pass filter open as the 8A groove of the next track layers in underneath, matching the near-identical BPMs for a seamless blend into the drop

g2n5.title: Ndlovu
g2n5.transition: Let Ndlovu's percussive groove ride out, then blend the bass frequencies into We Dance Again's bassline around the 32-bar mark, using a gentle high-pass filter sweep to lift the mix cleanly into Black Coffee's melodic vocal entry
